issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The text checks if your Leader has the {Red-Haired Pirates} type, not if a card is on board.
Condition field should be 'type' not 'name' for LeaderHasType. Should reference the type {Red-Haired Pirates}.
Target scope should be 'OpponentCharacter' not 'ChooseOpponentCharacter'. The 'Choose' prefix is implicit in targeted actions; scope describes the category only.
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Text explicitly states 'during this turn' which means the effect applies only while it's your turn, not until end of turn.
